evidence.claim: Rebuilt candidate-JD matching pipeline, improving NDCG@10 from 0.72 to 0.91
evidence.source_text: rebuilt the candidate-JD matching pipeline from scratch, taking it from 0.72 to 0.91 NDCG@10
operating at single-digit-millisecond p95 retrieval latency

evidence.claim: Technical expertise in embedding model selection, fine-tuning, hybrid retrieval, learning-to-rank, and behavioral-signal integration
evidence.source_text: My day-to-day work spans embedding model selection and fine-tuning, hybrid retrieval architecture, learning-to-rank, behavioral-signal integration

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes in ML development (metric definition, over-tuning, offline/online correlation)
evidence.source_text: I've made all the standard mistakes — embedding everything before defining the metric, over-investing in fine-tuning, optimizing offline metrics that don't move online — so I notice them faster now.

evidence.claim: Designed and rolled out a semantic search system for 35M+ items
evidence.source_text: Owned the design and rollout of a large-scale semantic search system serving an internal corpus of 35M+ items.

evidence.claim: Reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% and improved NDCG@10 by 18%
evidence.source_text: The new system reduced p95 retrieval latency by 60% while improving NDCG@10 by 18% on our held-out eval set.
Led a team of 4 engineers across the rollout.

evidence.claim: Technical proficiency in sentence-transformers, MPNet-base, and BGE-large
evidence.source_text: Migrated the existing BM25-only retrieval to a hybrid setup combining sparse and dense vectors (sentence-transformers, MPNet-base initially, later fine-tuned BGE-large for our domain).

evidence.claim: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B using LoRA and QLoRA
evidence.source_text: Fine-tuned LLaMA-2-7B and Mistral-7B variants using LoRA and QLoRA

evidence.claim: Curated 200K preference pairs for model training
evidence.source_text: Built the data curation pipeline that generated 200K high-quality preference pairs

evidence.claim: Reduced inference cost from $0.04 to under $0.001
evidence.source_text: Cost per inference dropped from $0.04 with GPT-3.5-fallback to under $0.001.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes BentoML, Kubernetes, and INT8 quantization
evidence.source_text: Deployed the model via BentoML on Kubernetes with sub-200ms p95 latency by quantizing to INT8

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes Pinecone and XGBoost for ranking pipelines
evidence.source_text: embedding generation (using a fine-tuned BGE-large) → Pinecone retrieval → learning-to-rank re-scoring (XGBoost)

evidence.claim: Completed Deep Learning Specialization (2024) and AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (2018)
evidence.source_text: Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2024); AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2018)
